Index.meta_title: H&T AI TECH — Production software and AI delivery
Index.meta_description: Senior engineers and AI specialists who embed with your team, ship into your repo, and deliver software you can run.

Hero.title: Ship production software and AI that your team can run.
Hero.description: Senior engineers embed with your roadmap — staff augmentation, dedicated teams, custom builds, and AI systems that move past demos.

HeroService.title: A full delivery catalog — scoped to outcomes, not buzzwords.
HeroService.description: From MVP and mobile to AI, data, and DevOps. Pick the lane that matches your delivery risk; we staff and ship against it.

HowweworkService.title: Collaborative delivery with clear ownership at every stage.
HowweworkService.description: Efficiency, transparency, and client-centered value — from first consultation to launch. We match the engagement model to the risk, then execute.

Services.section_title: Four ways to work with H&T AI TECH
Services.section_description: Choose the model that fits your control needs, timeline, and delivery risk.
Services.step1_description: Add specialized developers, designers, or QA into your team. Fast ramp, flexible engagement, you keep project control.
Services.step2_description: A cross-functional squad that works exclusively on your product — with project ownership, agile cadence, and end-to-end delivery.
Services.step3_description: From concept to launch: architecture, build, CI/CD, and post-launch support so you can focus on the business.
Services.step4_description: Computer vision, ML, and enterprise AI with evals, guardrails, and operational metrics — not demo-only wrappers.

Process.title: How a project starts producing signal
Process.description: Onboarding and early delivery decide whether a build succeeds. Our process keeps scope, risk, and ownership explicit.
Process.step1_description: Clarify goals, constraints, stack, and success criteria.
Process.step2_description: Map workflow, milestones, team shape, and delivery risks.
Process.step3_description: Build in short loops with review, quality gates, and visible progress.
Process.step4_description: Ship with thorough testing, rollout plans, and handover.

ProjectTeaser.title: AI systems already running in the field
ProjectTeaser.description: Smart-city computer vision, inspection automation, and traffic enforcement — built for real operating conditions.

Servicesforpage.ai_description: Production AI systems: models, pipelines, evals, and integration into products operators can trust.
Servicesforpage.mvp_description: Turn concepts into market-ready MVPs quickly — scoped for learning, not endless rebuilds.
Servicesforpage.qa_description: End-to-end quality assurance and test automation so releases stay reliable as you scale.
Servicesforpage.bi_description: Dashboards and BI workflows that turn raw data into decisions your team can act on.
Servicesforpage.ds_description: Analytics, predictive modeling, and ML-driven insights tied to real business questions.
Servicesforpage.ios_description: User-centric iOS apps with strong design and performance for brand-critical experiences.
Servicesforpage.ux_description: Human-centered interfaces that prioritize usability, clarity, and conversion.
Servicesforpage.android_description: Scalable Android applications engineered for diverse devices and business goals.
Servicesforpage.ml_description: Custom ML implementations tailored to your workflows, data, and operating constraints.
Servicesforpage.de_description: Robust data infrastructure for collection, processing, and analysis at enterprise scale.
Servicesforpage.fe_description: Responsive, pixel-accurate web interfaces that balance form and function across devices.
Servicesforpage.devops_description: Automation, collaboration, and delivery pipelines that shorten release cycles safely.

WhatWeProvide.title: Agile delivery with clear checkpoints
WhatWeProvide.description: We start with discovery — needs, objectives, timelines, and deliverables — then run collaborative sprints with visible progress.
WhatWeProvide.point3: Quality results that hold up after launch

Features.section_title: Unlock the Full Potential of the SaaS Template
Features.section_description: A free and open-source landing page template for your SaaS business, built with React, TypeScript, Shadcn UI, and Tailwind CSS.

CTA.title: Ready to move from idea to shipped software?
CTA.description: Bring the role, roadmap, and risks. We will help decide whether you need staff augmentation, a dedicated team, a scoped build, or an AI sprint.
